title: Meitnerium
body:
Simple mod to disable some rendering.

Features:
1. Disable all mobs rendering
2. Disable enities nametags
3. Disable item entities rendering (useful on big afk farms)
4. Disable tnt entities rendering
5. Disable sky rendering
6. Disable sign text rendering
7. Disable some particles
8. Disable tnt flash
9. Disable main hud rendering
10. Disable some camera effects
And other...

Menu key: G\
Showcase:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ff2fcdbdba9383e1fe85a1816f9fec9a34c917.png)
